check-console-log.sh.description: Warns on debug print statements in production code

check-as-any.sh.description: Warns on type safety bypasses (as any)

session-load.sh.description: Loads last session context on startup

session-save.sh.description: Auto-saves session context when conversation ends

pre-compact-save.sh.description: Saves session state before context compaction

suggest-compact.sh.description: Nudges compaction after 40+ tool calls to prevent context overflow
